subTopicTitle: Poems of the Decade (Anthology) — The Gun — Vicki Feaver

items.prompt: Identify and describe the central theme of 'The Gun' by Vicki Feaver.
keyPoints: The central theme of violence and its seductive power
The transformation of domestic space
Impact of the gun on the speaker and household dynamics

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: List three literary devices used in 'The Gun' and provide examples.
keyPoints: Imagery, e.g., vivid descriptions of the gun and its effects
Enjambment, e.g., how lines flow to enhance tension
Symbolism, e.g., the gun as a symbol of power and destruction

markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Summarize the narrative progression within 'The Gun'.
